name: Pasta Carbonara
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a small skillet over medium heat until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain well on a paper towel.
2. Bring water to a boil for cooking linguini. Add the linguini and cook until firm and tender, about 8-10 minutes, or until al dente.
3. Beat the eggs in a large bowl suitable for serving. Keep the cooked bacon and chopped parsley ready at hand.
4. Drain the linguini immediately after it is done cooking. Return to the pot of boiling water if needed for draining.
5. Transfer the drained pasta into the bowl with eggs. Toss quickly so that strands of pasta become coated with the beaten eggs, allowing their heat to gently cook the eggs.
6. Sprinkle the bacon and parsley over the pasta. Serve immediately. Enjoy this dish with additional grated Parmesan cheese and freshly ground black pepper.
